raw_consumer_statement:
CitiBank double cash credit card had multiple fraud charges made on it from XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX} and {$110.00} were not taken off, but two fraud charges were from the same place. 
I got alerted right away and on that same day, XX/XX/XXXX, I contacted CitiBank and they closed the credit card down and sent me a new card ( s ) immediately. Upon my new card account being opened, I saw that two of the fraudulent charges were transferred to my new account from my old. I have called four times to get this fixed, being told that the charges would be taken off because of the fraud. 
TODAY, I get on the account again, and I read on the fraud charges that the dispute has been resolved and I am responsible for the charges. I called AGAIN stating that this was FRAUD from XX/XX/XXXX and why am I responsible. I told their fraud department that there were TWO charges for a supermarket and one was taken off, but not the other. 
They still have not taken the charges of my card, even though I received my new cards today. BOTH of my old credit card physical cards were in our home in upstate NY when these fraudulent charges on the XXXX XXXX happened. I seem to be running in circles with this bank on getting these fraud charges reversed, even though they claim 100 % fraud protection liability. 
Thank You XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX
